query: My description is 'I can help you find vulnerabilities in your GraphQL schema.' Is that good?
expected_behavior: Flags the first-person POV ('I can help...') as a violation of the description rules
Rewrites or proposes a third-person replacement description that names both WHAT the skill does and WHEN to trigger it
Cites the underlying rule — either the Anthropic best-practices guidance or the equivalent RCS conventions rule about third-person, system-prompt-injected descriptions
